protocol.name: NWE-8 frozen pre-2024 selection evaluation
protocol.target: weekly unlevered entry-open to exit-open log return
protocol.label_availability: feature_available_at and label exit <= refit decision
protocol.target_centering: training mean removed and never added back
protocol.stale_control: previous weekly snapshot, exactly seven calendar days stale
protocol.permutation_control: training features permuted causally within year per refit
protocol.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM; favorable then adverse held OHLC; funding credits raise HWM while debits lower the adverse envelope; hypothetical adverse liquidation cost
protocol.cagr: full wall-clock split including abstained cash weeks

market.physical_parse_boundary: stop before parsing the first date >= 2024-01-01

failures: train: mean gross edge below 20 bp
train: one-bar-delayed entry non-positive absolute return
primary_performance_gate_failures: train: mean gross edge below 20 bp
delayed_entry_gate_failures: train: one-bar-delayed entry non-positive absolute return

stale_features_7d: train: mean gross edge below 20 bp
year_stratified_feature_permutation: train: mean gross edge below 20 bp
select2023: mean gross edge below 20 bp
